description_long: This is a single athletic running shoe featuring a predominantly black mesh upper with a large white swoosh logo on the side. The midsole is thick and white, designed for cushioning and support, while the outsole is brown with a bold zigzag tread pattern for traction. The shoe has black laces in a standard criss-cross style and a reinforced toe area for durability. The heel and collar are padded for comfort, and the overall silhouette is streamlined and modern, suitable for urban environments. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic mesh, rubber, and foam, typical for performance footwear. The shoe shows minimal signs of wear, indicating it is in lightly used condition.
description: A black athletic running shoe with a white swoosh logo, thick white midsole, and brown zigzag-patterned outsole. It features black laces and a modern, cushioned design.
description_view_0: The view highlights the brown outsole with a prominent white zigzag tread pattern and a glimpse of the white midsole.
description_view_1: This angle shows the top and side, revealing the black mesh upper, white swoosh logo, and black laces.
description_view_2: A clear side profile displaying the large white swoosh, black mesh upper, and the thick white midsole.
description_view_3: The sole is fully visible, emphasizing the zigzag tread and brown rubber material.
attribute_logo: Large white swoosh on the side of the shoe
